age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be admissible in respect of SC / ST / OBC candidates, retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates (including projects) and Ex-service men etc. in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government / DoPT / ICMR from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience in the relevant subject OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences with PhD in the relevant subject
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience in the relevant subject OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences with PhD in the relevant subject.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (if applicable) Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ICMR-NIHR recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for this post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Biomedical Sciences, Genetics, or Life Sciences with three years of relevant experience or a PhD in the relevant subject is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in-interview/Written Test, and potentially a Skill Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. Please refer to the official notification for the exact venue details.
